title: Split Disability/Disorder Category JSON Package
how_to_use: Start with 00_manifest.json for the package overview.
Use 01_condition_and_disorder_index.json to find a condition, device, or disorder entry and see which category files contain it.
Use 02-10 category files for brain/body/psychological/social/professional/personal/mobility/accommodation/emergency access modeling.
Use 11_source_raw_text_and_original_json_preservation_map.json and original_source_jsons/ to recover the complete original source JSON content.
note: The category files are reorganized and normalized; the original source JSONs are included unchanged for full preservation.
